warmup.notes:
3 rounds:
200m row
10 PVC pass-throughs
10 air squats
10 push-up to down dog

strength.notes: Rest 2:00 between sets. Start at ~60% and add weight each set.

accessory.notes:
3x15 GHD hip extensions
3x20 banded pull-aparts
2x30s dead hang

warmup.notes:
5 min easy row
Then 2 rounds:
10 KB deadlifts
10 leg swings each side
5 inchworms

strength.prescription: Kipping drills, sets of 3-5, focus on rhythm
strength.notes: Not for score. Build quality positions. Scale to hanging knee raises if needed.

warmup.notes:
3 rounds:
5 push-ups
10 ring rows
15 band pull-aparts
10 PVC strict press

strength.notes: Same weight across all sets. Rest 1:30 between sets.
Control the descent. Full stop at the bottom, then drive up. Rest 2:00.

accessory.notes:
3x12 DB bent-over rows
3x15 tricep dips
2x20 banded face pulls

warmup.notes:
3 rounds:
10 good mornings (empty bar)
10 box step-ups
10 wrist circles each direction
5 broad jumps

strength.notes: Reset between reps — no touch-and-go. Start at ~50%, add 5-10% per set. 5-6 working sets total.

accessory.notes:
3x12 GHD sit-ups
3x20 banded face pulls
2x30s side plank each side

warmup.notes:
800m easy jog
Then 2 rounds:
10 PVC overhead squats
10 groiners
5 strict pull-ups

strength.notes: Every 90 seconds for 8 sets. Start light, add weight each set. Focus on speed under the bar.
